programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: People and Power
programme.desc: People and Power explores the role of Lebanese citizens in the absence of the state.
programme.series-desc:
People & Power is a current affairs programme on Al Jazeera English which broadcasts once a week, on Wednesdays, and repeated throughout the week.
Each half-hour programme features one investigative documentaries on an issue related to power from around the world. The programme occasionally has one hour specials.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Talk to Al Jazeera
programme.desc: One-on-one conversations with global leaders, icons, influencers and alternative voices shaping our times.
programme.series-desc:
Al Jazeera’s flagship interview show. A weekly one-on-one conversation with global leaders, icons, influencers, and alternative voices shaping our times.
We also interview the voiceless - individuals who by accident or choice find themselves in extraordinary events. On Talk to Al Jazeera - In the Field

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Fault Lines
programme.desc: Fault Lines follows the journey of a 14-year old girl named Leyan Abul-Atta who lost her leg in an Israeli airstrike as she seeks medical treatment in the U.S.
programme.series-desc: Fault Lines, a documentary series produced and broadcast by Al Jazeera English, is the former's flagship program about the Americas and the latter's main investigative program. Josh Rushing, Zeina Awad, and Sebastian Walker host the series.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Al Jazeera Untangles
programme.desc: We claim to value privacy, but surrender it daily, often without knowing.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.

programme.title: The Bottom Line
programme.desc: Trump sees himself as a peacemaker who prefers "one and done" military solutions to permanent engagement with the world. Is it working?
programme.series-desc: The Bottom Line is a business discussion programme broadcast in the UK on BBC Radio 4 and the BBC News Channel, and internationally on the BBC World Service and BBC World News. It is co-production between BBC News and The Open University.

programme.title: Al Shifa Hospital
programme.desc: A year into the genocide in Gaza, survivors of the destruction of Al Shifa hospital recount the tragedy.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Today on the Stream: We look into why many women in the West are turning to the traditional stay-at-home lifestyle.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Counting the Cost
programme.desc: The show features the economical stories that shape our world and has an effect on the lives of the common human beings.

programme.title: Fault Lines
programme.desc: Fault Lines follows the journey of a 14-year old girl named Leyan Abul-Atta who lost her leg in an Israeli airstrike as she seeks medical treatment in the U.S.
programme.series-desc: Fault Lines, a documentary series produced and broadcast by Al Jazeera English, is the former's flagship program about the Americas and the latter's main investigative program. Josh Rushing, Zeina Awad, and Sebastian Walker host the series.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. programme.title: This Is Europe
programme.desc: In this story of life, love and laughter, a family of Muslim undertakers offer a glimpse into a community the far right has tried to demonise.
programme.series-desc: Tired of just scraping by, an ambitious janitor scams and schemes his way to the good life in 1980s Poland amid changing regimes and personal chaos.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: 101 East
programme.desc: 101 East follows Bangladesh's efforts to rebuild itself after the collapse of Sheikh Hasina's government.
programme.series-desc: Bold, untold stories from across Asia and the Pacific. Al Jazeera's in-depth, weekly current affairs programme from the world's most populated region.

programme.title: Studio B: Unscripted
programme.desc: Photojournalist Shahidul Alam and anti-arms trade campaigner Andrew Feinstein on challenging the global status quo and standing up to power.

programme.title: Inside Story

programme.title: Al Jazeera World
programme.desc: The powerful story of library staff in Sarajevo risking their lives to rescue over 10,000 precious books and manuscripts in the midst of the war in Bosnia.
programme.series-desc:
A series of one-hour documentaries showcasing films from across the Al Jazeera Network.
English

programme.title: Counting the Cost
programme.desc: The show features the economical stories that shape our world and has an effect on the lives of the common human beings.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.
programme.series-desc: A BBC documentary film strand, with the focus on investigative journalism.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc: The Streamy Awards is the foremost recognition within the creator community, honoring excellence in a variety of content verticals and areas of expertise.

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.
programme.series-desc: A BBC documentary film strand, with the focus on investigative journalism.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Drug trafficking, poverty, gang violence, corruption and ethnic warfare have created some of the most dangerous hot spots on Earth. Follow our current generation of photojournalists into these conflict zones, see what compels them and experience why, when everyone else seeks cover, the photojournalist stands and moves closer.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: 101 East
programme.desc: 101 East follows Bangladesh's efforts to rebuild itself after the collapse of Sheikh Hasina's government.
programme.series-desc: Bold, untold stories from across Asia and the Pacific. Al Jazeera's in-depth, weekly current affairs programme from the world's most populated region.

programme.title: Talk to Al Jazeera
programme.desc: One-on-one conversations with global leaders, icons, influencers and alternative voices shaping our times.
programme.series-desc:
Al Jazeera’s flagship interview show. A weekly one-on-one conversation with global leaders, icons, influencers, and alternative voices shaping our times.
We also interview the voiceless - individuals who by accident or choice find themselves in extraordinary events. On Talk to Al Jazeera - In the Field

programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.

programme.title: Studio B: Unscripted
programme.desc: Photojournalist Shahidul Alam and anti-arms trade campaigner Andrew Feinstein on challenging the global status quo and standing up to power.

programme.title: Al Shifa Hospital
programme.desc: A year into the genocide in Gaza, survivors of the destruction of Al Shifa hospital recount the tragedy.

programme.title: Fault Lines
programme.desc: Fault Lines follows the journey of a 14-year old girl named Leyan Abul-Atta who lost her leg in an Israeli airstrike as she seeks medical treatment in the U.S.
programme.series-desc: Al Jazeera Documentary series focusing started in 2009.

programme.title: The Bottom Line
programme.desc: Trump sees himself as a peacemaker who prefers "one and done" military solutions to permanent engagement with the world. Is it working?
programme.series-desc: The Bottom Line is a business discussion programme broadcast in the UK on BBC Radio 4 and the BBC News Channel, and internationally on the BBC World Service and BBC World News. It is co-production between BBC News and The Open University.

programme.title: CNA Correspondent
programme.desc: CNA correspondents from Asia and Europe examine different current affairs, offering their take and updates from across the globe.

programme.title: Money Mind
programme.desc: An insight into how to make the most of finances, with tips for investors and economic, market, and trend analysis.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: Investigations of contemporary issues and events, offering a range of perspectives on stories and how they affect people.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: Providing people a round-up of all the day's events in Singapore, while also covering the breaking news.

programme.title: On the Red Dot
programme.desc: The issues that motivate, provoke, and unite the people of Singapore, featuring personal stories from inspirational individuals.

programme.title: Born in 1965
programme.desc: Singaporean icon Gurmit Singh embarks on a journey to discover the meaning of life after 60, as well as ways to age healthily and with purpose.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: Views, current affairs and headlining news from around the region, with a unique Asian perspective and expertise.

programme.title: A Street Like This
programme.desc: Spancer kicks off the show in Bangkok, exploring Charoen Krung Road and delving into its vibrant creative revival.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: Providing people a round-up of all the day's events in Singapore, while also covering the breaking news.

programme.title: CNA Correspondent
programme.desc: CNA correspondents from Asia and Europe examine different current affairs, offering their take and updates from across the globe.

programme.desc: Coverage of what's happening around the world and in the region, with expert analysis of all the news.

programme.title: Headline News
programme.desc: An update on news from the local area and around the globe to help keep people informed about what's happening.

programme.title: Asia Now
programme.desc: Coverage of what's happening around the world and in the region, with expert analysis of all the news.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Newscast: The Trump-Putin Summit
programme.desc: Newscast, Americast, and Ukrainecast discuss the summit of US President Donald Trump and Russia's President Putin.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Alasdair Keane visits Schiphol Airport to see how self-driving vehicles are being trialled to help with airport logistics the musicians using AI code during live performances.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: The Travel Show: Going Loco: Mexico's Maya Train
programme.desc: Qasa Alom continues his journey on the Maya Train, the line that connects the towns, villages and historic sites of Mexico's Yucatan peninsula.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: DW
programme.desc: Detailed explanations, expert analysis, full coverage from the worlds of politics, business, sports and culture. Stories you won't see elsewhere. Fascinating insights beyond the headlines.

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Everything we know about life can be found in sports: Success and failure, euphoria and despair. Sports Life tells stories from across the globe, where sport drives personal growth and changes lives.

programme.title: DW
programme.desc: DW News Africa: our daily look at the people and stories beyond the headlines in Africa, with reports from our correspondents across the region.

programme.title: DW
programme.desc: Detailed explanations, expert analysis, full coverage from the worlds of politics, business, sports and culture. Stories you won't see elsewhere. Fascinating insights beyond the headlines.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: How is the Internet changing society – in Germany and around the world? The magazine for digital culture, issues and technology, delivered directly from blogs and boardrooms.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 percent of Africans are younger than 35. These are the people who will shape the continent's future. DW's TV magazine The 77 Percent gives Africa's youth a platform for debate, information and inspiration.

programme.title: DW
programme.desc: Detailed explanations, expert analysis, full coverage from the worlds of politics, business, sports and culture. Stories you won't see elsewhere. Fascinating insights beyond the headlines.

programme.title: Reporter
programme.desc: DW's on-the-ground reporters are always close to the action. They report on the changes they see taking place in Germany, Europe and around the world.

programme.title: DW
programme.desc: Detailed explanations, expert analysis, full coverage from the worlds of politics, business, sports and culture. Stories you won't see elsewhere. Fascinating insights beyond the headlines.

programme.title: DocFilm
programme.desc: A unique look at today's world, featuring exclusive reports on current events and in-depth stories about what moves and inspires people around the globe.

programme.title: DW
programme.desc: Detailed explanations, expert analysis, full coverage from the worlds of politics, business, sports and culture. Stories you won't see elsewhere. Fascinating insights beyond the headlines.

programme.title: Reporter
programme.desc: DW's on-the-ground reporters are always close to the action. They report on the changes they see taking place in Germany, Europe and around the world.

programme.title: Afrimaxx
programme.desc: Afrimaxx celebrates the contemporary lifestyle of sub-Saharan Africa. The weekly lifestyle magazine seeks out the continent's innovation and inspiration across the spectrum – from fashion and interior design to architecture, arts, food and travel.
